Name: m14_PointLightBank
Description: Determines the parameters for point lights.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to start attenuating the point light source. In metres.

Fields.Name: Attenuation End Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to stop attenuating the point light source. In metres.

Fields.Name: Light Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the coloring for the point light.

Fields.Name: Light Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the coloring for the point light.

Fields.Name: Light Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the coloring for the point light.

Fields.Name: Light Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the coloring for the point light.
